    Retrieves the theme currently active in the application.

    Retrieves a configuration value as a double.

    Looks up an ImageView for a given brush name string.

    Retrieves a configuration value as an integer.

    getString(String) - Static method in class utils.config.Config
    Retrieves a raw string from the configuration.
    GifSequenceWriter - Class in utils.gif
    Utility class for writing animated GIFs frame-by-frame.
    GifSequenceWriter(ImageOutputStream, int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class utils.gif.GifSequenceWriter
    Creates a GIF sequence writer that can receive frames one at a time.
